BMABMDR 0.1.20
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction to BMABMDR: Bayesian Model Averaging for Benchmark Dose Analysis
  • Changelog

Reference

All functions

anydoseresponseN() anydoseresponseLN() anydoseresponseC() anydoseresponseQ()

Function to determine if there is a dose-response effect

bartlett()

Bartlett function for testing constant variance and co-efficient of variation; H0 equal variances

basic.plot() basic.plotQ()

Basic dose-response plots for covariate analysis

BMABMDR-package BMABMDR

The 'BMABMDR' package.

BMDLU()

Function to extract the BMDL,BMD and BMDU

BMDMA_extract() BMDMAQ_extract()

Function to extract model averaged BMD

BMDmixture_extract() BMDQmixture_extract()

Function to extract BMD mixture

BMDWeights()

Function to get BMDs and weights

convergence_deci()

Function for internal use; decides if model has converged based on Rhat, bulk and tail ESS

convergence_deciC()

Function for internal use; decides if model has converged based on Rhat, bulk and tail ESS

DRM.E4_NI() DRM.IE4_NI() DRM.H4_NI() DRM.LN4_NI() DRM.G4_NI() DRM.QE4_NI() DRM.P4_NI() DRM.L4_NI() DRM.E4_LNI() DRM.IE4_LNI() DRM.H4_LNI() DRM.LN4_LNI() DRM.G4_LNI() DRM.QE4_LNI() DRM.P4_LNI() DRM.L4_LNI() DRM.E4_ND() DRM.IE4_ND() DRM.H4_ND() DRM.LN4_ND() DRM.G4_ND() DRM.QE4_ND() DRM.P4_ND() DRM.L4_ND() DRM.E4_LND() DRM.IE4_LND() DRM.H4_LND() DRM.LN4_LND() DRM.G4_LND() DRM.QE4_LND() DRM.P4_LND() DRM.L4_LND() DRM.E4_Q() DRM.IE4_Q() DRM.H4_Q() DRM.LN4_Q() DRM.G4_Q() DRM.QE4_Q() DRM.P4_Q() DRM.L4_Q()

The dose response models

DRM()

Function for internal use

expit()

Function for internal use

flat()

Function for internal use to determine if DR curve flattens out for continuous data

flatC()

Function for internal use to determine if DR curve flattens out for clustered continuous data

full.laplace_MA() full.laplace_MAc() full.laplaceQ_MA()

Model averaging using Full Laplace method

full.laplace_MA_Cov() full.laplace_MA_Q_Cov()

Perform model averaging using Full Laplace method for data with covariate effect

fun.alpha() fun.beta()

Functions to get parameters for PERT prior (internal use)

fun.w() fun.w.QE4() fun.wQ() fun.wQ.QE4()

Function to calculate weights for Laplace including a covariate effect (used internally)

fun_cov_selection() fun_cov_selectionQ()

Function to perform model selection when including a covariate effect (used internally)

fun_optim() fun_optimC() fun_optimQ() fun_optimCov() fun_optimQCov()

Function to perform Laplace approximation for a given dose-response model (used internally).

fun_sampling() fun_samplingC() fun_samplingQ()

Function to perform MCMC sampling for a given dose-response model (used internally).

getBMD() getBMD_Q()

Function for internal use

get_models()

Obtain a list of all available models

is.BMADR()

function to check if object is of class BMADR and its subcalsses

is.BMADR2()

function to check if object is of class BMADR and its subcalsses for internal use

is.BMADRQ()

function to check if object is of class BMADR and its subcalsses

is.BMADRQ2()

function to check if object is of class BMADR and its subcalsses for internal use

is.stanfit()

function to check if object is of class stanfit

is.stanfitOptim()

function to check if object is of class stanfit optim

llfE42_Q() llfIE42_Q() llfH42_Q() llfLN42_Q() llfG42_Q() llfQE42_Q() llfP42_Q() llfL42_Q() llfSM2_Q() llfH02_Q()

Loglikelihood functions for the different dose response models, for clustered quantal data

llfE4_NI() llfIE4_NI() llfH4_NI() llfLN4_NI() llfG4_NI() llfQE4_NI() llfP4_NI() llfSM_N() llfL4_NI() llfE4_LNI() llfIE4_LNI() llfH4_LNI() llfLN4_LNI() llfG4_LNI() llfQE4_LNI() llfP4_LNI() llfL4_LNI() llfSM_LN() llfE4_ND() llfIE4_ND() llfH4_ND() llfLN4_ND() llfG4_ND() llfQE4_ND() llfP4_ND() llfL4_ND() llfE4_LND() llfIE4_LND() llfH4_LND() llfLN4_LND() llfG4_LND() llfQE4_LND() llfP4_LND() llfL4_LND()

Loglikelihood functions for the different dose response models, for continuous data

llfE4_NIc() llfIE4_NIc() llfH4_NIc() llfLN4_NIc() llfG4_NIc() llfQE4_NIc() llfP4_NIc() llfL4_NIc() llfE4_LNIc() llfIE4_LNIc() llfH4_LNIc() llfLN4_LNIc() llfG4_LNIc() llfQE4_LNIc() llfP4_LNIc() llfL4_LNIc() llfSM_LNc() llfSM_Nc() llfH0_Nc() llfE4_NDc() llfIE4_NDc() llfH4_NDc() llfLN4_NDc() llfG4_NDc() llfQE4_NDc() llfP4_NDc() llfL4_NDc() llfE4_LNDc() llfIE4_LNDc() llfH4_LNDc() llfLN4_LNDc() llfG4_LNDc() llfQE4_LNDc() llfP4_LNDc() llfL4_LNDc()

Loglikelihood functions for the different dose response models, for clustered continuous data

llfE4_NI_Cov() llfIE4_NI_Cov() llfH4_NI_Cov() llfLN4_NI_Cov() llfG4_NI_Cov() llfQE4_NI_Cov() llfP4_NI_Cov() llfL4_NI_Cov() llfE4_LNI_Cov() llfIE4_LNI_Cov() llfH4_LNI_Cov() llfLN4_LNI_Cov() llfG4_LNI_Cov() llfQE4_LNI_Cov() llfP4_LNI_Cov() llfL4_LNI_Cov() llfE4_ND_Cov() llfIE4_ND_Cov() llfH4_ND_Cov() llfLN4_ND_Cov() llfG4_ND_Cov() llfQE4_ND_Cov() llfP4_ND_Cov() llfL4_ND_Cov() llfE4_LND_Cov() llfIE4_LND_Cov() llfH4_LND_Cov() llfLN4_LND_Cov() llfG4_LND_Cov() llfQE4_LND_Cov() llfP4_LND_Cov() llfL4_LND_Cov()

Loglikelihood functions for the different dose response models, for continuous data with covariates

llfE4_Q() llfIE4_Q() llfH4_Q() llfLN4_Q() llfG4_Q() llfQE4_Q() llfP4_Q() llfL4_Q() llfSM_Q() llfH0_Q()

Loglikelihood functions for the different dose response models, for quantal data

llfE4_Q_Cov() llfIE4_Q_Cov() llfH4_Q_Cov() llfLN4_Q_Cov() llfG4_Q_Cov() llfQE4_Q_Cov() llfP4_Q_Cov() llfL4_Q_Cov()

Loglikelihood functions for the different dose response models, for quantal data with covariates

LNtoN()

Function to convert geometric to arithmetic mean/standard deviation

logit()

Function for internal use

modelTest() modelTestC() modelTestQ()

Function used internally to test whether the best fitting model fits the data well, compared to a saturated (non-monotone) model

NLN_test()

Performs Shapiro-Wilk's test for normality on individual dose-response data

NtoLN()

Function to convert arithmetic to geometric mean/standard deviation

outLP() outLPQ()

Function to retrieve estimated model parameters for each model

par_extract() par_extractC() parq_extract()

Function to extract the sampled values for the model parameters and the BMD

par_med()

Function to get the median of the needed parameters for predicted values

pert_dist()

Functions to get parameters for PERT prior (internal use)

plot.BMADR() plot.BMADRQ()

Function to plot the analysis results

plot_prior() plot_priorQ()

Plot function for the prior and posterior distribution of model parameters

posterior_diag()

Function for internal use

posterior_diagC()

Function for internal use

predict(<BMADR>) predict(<BMADRQ>)

Function to get predicted values from the DRMs

PREP_DATA_N() PREP_DATA_LN()

Function to set data in the correct input format for model-averaging functions, for continuous data

PREP_DATA_NCOV() PREP_DATA_LNCOV()

Function to set data in the correct input format for model-averaging functions, for continuous data with covariate effect (used internally)

PREP_DATA_N_C() PREP_DATA_LN_C()

Function to set data in the correct input format for model-averaging functions, for clustered continuous data

PREP_DATA_QA()

Function to set data in the correct format, for quantal data

PREP_DATA_Q_COV()

Function to set data in the correct format, for quantal data with covariate effect (used internally)

print(<BMADR>)

Function to print estimated BMDs and model weights for a BMDBMA model object

rnd()

Function for internal use

sampling_MA() sampling_MAc() samplingQ_MA()

Perform model averaging using MCMC methods (Bridge sampling & Partial Laplace)

summarize.indiv.data()

Function to summarize individual data

summary.BMADR()

Summary function for BMDBMA model objects

weightsQ_extract() weights_extract()

Function to turn the vector of weights into dataframe

Contents

Developed by C’ecile Kremer, Oluwafemi Olusoji, Marc Aerts, Ziv Shkedy, Jos’e Cortinas Abrahantes.
